title: hieracium bifidum subsp. prasiolaetum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. prasiolaetum, also known as a subspecies of Hawkweed, is a perennial plant with yellow dandelion-like flowers and green foliage. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Hieracium bifidum subsp. prasiolaetum can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, for medicinal use.
